body.body: Decisions: D130, D131, D132. New scripts: slate_manager.py, github_sync.py, docs_sync.py, run_phrase_test.py. Fixed: budget.py SQLite, server.py HTTP fallback, igor_talk/cc_bridge/phrase_regression/cc_queue wss+https. Slate concept defined + implemented. Subsystems touched: web/server.py (SSL+HTTP), tools/budget.py (SQLite), claudecode/ (5 new/updated scripts), decisions_log.dsb (D130-D132). Update gap_analysis, subsystem_tools.dsb, subsystem_web_network.dsb, MEMORY.md. Post to GH discussion #62. Commit: docs: savestate session 2026-03-19c — Slate 0 complete: workflow tooling + DB as truth.
body.title: Savestate steps 4-9 for session 2026-03-19c
